params.name: filter
params.description: SCIM filter expression (e.g., userName eq "user@example.com"). Supports eq operator on userName.

params.name: startIndex
params.description: The 1-based index of the first result to return.

params.name: count
params.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of SCIM user resources. Supports filtering by user attributes and pagination using startIndex and count parameters per the SCIM 2.0 specification.
Provisions a new user in Airtable through the SCIM protocol. The user will be added to the enterprise account. SSO must be configured as Airtable does not allow setting passwords through SCIM.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM user resource.

items.docs: Retrieves a single SCIM user resource by its unique identifier. Returns the complete user profile including name, email, and active status.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM user resource.

items.docs: Replaces a SCIM user resource entirely. All attributes are overwritten with the values in the request body. This is a full replacement, not a partial update.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM user resource.

items.docs: Partially updates a SCIM user resource using SCIM PATCH operations. Supports add, replace, and remove operations on user attributes. Commonly used to activate or deactivate users.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM user resource.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a SCIM user resource from the enterprise account. The user will lose access to all Airtable resources associated with the enterprise.

params.name: startIndex
params.description: The 1-based index of the first result to return.

params.name: count
params.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of SCIM group resources. Supports filtering by group display name and pagination using startIndex and count.
Creates a new SCIM group in the enterprise account. Groups can contain user members and are used for access management.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM group resource.

items.docs: Retrieves a single SCIM group resource by its unique identifier, including its member list.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM group resource.

items.docs: Replaces a SCIM group resource entirely with the provided data. The complete member list must be included in the request.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM group resource.

items.docs: Partially updates a SCIM group resource using SCIM PATCH operations. Commonly used to add or remove members from the group without replacing the entire resource.

params.name: groupId
params.description: The unique identifier of the SCIM group resource.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a SCIM group from the enterprise account. Members are not deleted but are removed from the group.
